hero.tagline: The stack is irrelevant. The gap between your idea and a shipped product just got a lot smaller.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Not a Python developer. Not a TypeScript developer. The stack is irrelevant. AI collapsed the distance between concept and execution — and I've been exploiting that ever since. I architect intelligent systems, ship full-stack applications, and automate workflows that used to require entire teams. The only question: what should we build?

gaming.title: Gaming
gaming.description: One of my passions is video games. From an early age, I've been drawn to good stories, great storytelling, and solving puzzles — one of the big reasons I chose this field.

fitness.title: Fitness
fitness.description: I believe balance between mind and body is key to dealing with everyday challenges. I try to stay as active as possible and maintain a healthy diet.

music.title: Music
music.description: I love all styles of music — every genre has its moment. Music has always had a meaningful impact on my life and work.

learning.title: Learning
learning.description: Learning about everything has always fascinated me. I'm always chasing something new — different subjects to master, not just in a professional sense.

description: Architecting and building a new generative AI support assistant from scratch, leveraging Python (FastAPI), LangChain, OpenAI, and Pinecone to create an advanced RAG pipeline integrated with Zendesk.
Spearheading the end-to-end development of a new self-service support portal, projected to significantly reduce manual ticket volume and decrease customer resolution time.
Developing and maintaining the full-stack application, including the React/Next.js frontend and Python/FastAPI microservices backend utilizing PostgreSQL and Redis.
Owning and automating all cloud infrastructure on AWS using Terraform (IaC), with Docker for containerization and GitLab for CI/CD.
Engineered secure and observable systems by implementing AWS Cognito (JWT/Cookies) for authentication and integrating DataDog for comprehensive application monitoring.
In this role, I am learning prompt engineering in order to take advantage of the most recent AI tools to improve my productivity and efficiency.
Develop and maintain the company's SDK using Python. It was used also Pandas for data processing and Pytest for unit tests.
Helped build GithubActions CI/CD pipelines for Python's repo.
Joined dashboard team to help building dashboards, using SQL (snowflake), pandas and the company's SDK.
Optimize data workflows between Python services and cloud databases (Snowflake).
Helped build the company's interactive testing suite with Playwright, both Python and JavaScript. Also created loading tests using Grafana K6
Currently working on enterprise LLM agents project, where I'm responsible to link the AI result with the Web stack
Continuously learning modern tech stacks to support cross-functional projects
Developed a Proof of Concept (PoC) for a system that automatically generates test cases from software requirements.
Built a functional web application (full-stack) covering core objectives, demonstrating end-to-end viability.
Key Technologies: Node.js (backend), IBM Watson (AI-powered features), and Cloud Computing for deployment.
Gained hands-on full-stack development experience, focusing on scalability and automation.

services.title: What I Build
services.subtitle: The tech stack is not the limit. The only question is: what should we build for you?

items.title: AI-Powered Products
items.description: Your idea becomes an intelligent product. LLM agents, RAG systems, AI-powered apps — I handle architecture, integration, and deployment end-to-end.

items.title: Full-Stack Web Apps
items.description: A production-ready web application, from scratch. Modern stack, clean code, great UX — shipped on schedule.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.description: The manual work slowing your team down, eliminated. Custom AI pipelines built around your specific processes.

items.title: Rapid Prototyping
items.description: A working version of your idea in days. Validate the concept before committing — test the market, not the budget.

showcase.title: Showcase
showcase.description: These fictional brands were designed and developed to demonstrate AI-assisted UI/UX capabilities across different niches.
